keyFacts: Krumblor unlocks after How to bake your dragon and A crumbly egg.
Sacrificing cookies and buildings trains Krumblor and unlocks selectable dragon auras.
Switching auras costs one of the highest-tier buildings owned.
Common high-value aura goals include Radiant Appetite for production, Dragonflight/Dragon Harvest for combos, Dragon's Curve for sugar lumps, and Dragon Guts for wrinklers.
__summary.intro: Krumblor the cookie dragon is a widget that was added in v1.9 of the game. By sacrificing cookies and buildings to Krumblor, the player will unlock selectable auras which provide various benefits in the game. An aura can be selected by clicking on the dragon. Switching auras costs one of the highest tier building(s) owned by the player. To unlock Krumblor, the player must purchase the Heavenly Upgrade 'How to bake your dragon', which in turn unlocks the upgrade 'A crumbly egg' in all subsequent playthroughs.
__summary.petting: After the player purchases the Pet the dragon heavenly upgrade, it is possible to pet Krumblor (by clicking on the Krumblor's icon); this will trigger heart particles. If Krumblor has been leveled up beyond level 8 (after sacrificing 100 farms), every time it is pet there is a 5% chance to drop an upgrade. The choice of dropped upgrade goes as follows: first, the game shuffles the list of available drops (Dragon scale, Dragon claw, Dragon fang, Dragon teddy bear) based on the game seed. Then, if the minute of the current time is between 0 and 14, the first upgrade of the shuffle is available for dropping (so if the 5% test passes, it is that upgrade that is dropped). If the minute is between 15 and 29, the second upgrade may be dropped, and so on. Since the shuffle is based only on the game seed, to get all four drops, it is necessary to pet the dragon every quarter of an hour. Note that the 5% is not affected by upgrades and effects that change random drop rates (like Cosmic Beginn...
__summary.strategy: MilkBreath-1 If a player is going for the overall highest CPS boosts with auras, a combination of Breath of Milk and Radiant Appetite will produce the largest CPS increase (Note: At a point of around ~12,000 buildings and Grandmatriarchs at max stage, Elder Battalion and Radiant Appetite becomes superior to combination listed above). If a player is going for harvesting as many sugar lumps as possible, they should use a combination of Dragon's Curve and Reality Bending, as it reduces the maturation time and increases unusual lump rate the most. This image shows the multiplier for the Breath of Milk dragon aura, based on the milk percentage and which kitten upgrades are active. The bottom line is the base multiplier, the next lines are the multiplier with Mokalsium, Mother Spirit at 5% or 10%. The lines for each kitten upgrade assume that all previous kitten upgrades are active as well. The base line assumes Santa's milk and cookies has been bought, but the 1.05 milk multiplier of Santa's milk would equal Mokalsium, Mother Spirit at 5%. The overall effect of Dragon Cursor depends on how much the player clicks the Big Cookie, but as a rough estimate, with all upgrades, they will make approximately 1% more cookies at 2 clicks per second, 2% at 4 clicks per second, 3% at 10 clicks per second, 4% at 25 clicks per second, 4.5% at 55 clicks per second, and 4.9% at 300 clicks per second. With optimal building distribution, Elder Battalion will give an overall very early game production increase of about 1%. It can increase total production in the early game by a 5 fold after the...

If Krumblor has been leveled up beyond level 8 (after sacrificing 100 farms), every time it is pet there is a 5% chance to drop an upgrade. The choice of dropped upgrade goes as follows: first, the game shuffles the list of available drops (Dragon scale, Dragon claw, Dragon fang, Dragon teddy bear) based on the game seed. Then, if the minute of the current time is between 0 and 14, the first upgrade of the shuffle is available for dropping (so if the 5% test passes, it is that upgrade that is dropped). If the minute is between 15 and 29, the second upgrade may be dropped, and so on. Since the shuffle is based only on the game seed, to get all four drops, it is necessary to pet the dragon every quarter of an hour. How to bake your dragon.Name: How to bake your dragon
How to bake your dragon.description: Allows you to purchase a crumbly egg once you have earned 1 million cookies. "A tome full of helpful tips such as 'oh god, stay away from it', 'why did we buy this thing, it's not even house-broken' and 'groom twice a week in the direction of the scales'."
How to bake your dragon.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text
How to bake your dragon.wikiName: How to bake your dragon (heavenly upgrade)

Pet the dragon.Name: Pet the dragon
Pet the dragon.unlock condition: "How to bake your dragon" and "Residual luck" purchased
Pet the dragon.description: Unlocks the ability to pet your dragon by clicking on it once hatched. "Dragons do not purr. If your dragon starts purring, vacate the area immediately."
Pet the dragon.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text

A crumbly egg.Name: A crumbly egg
A crumbly egg.unlock condition: 1 million cookies earned and "How to bake your dragon" purchased
A crumbly egg.description: Unlocks the cookie dragon egg. "Thank you for adopting this robust, fun-loving cookie dragon! It will bring you years of joy and entertainment. Keep in a dry and cool place, and away from other house pets. Subscription to home insurance is strongly advised."
A crumbly egg.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text

Dragon scale.Name: Dragon scale
Dragon scale.base price: Money 1,800 x CpS (x0.1 if max level dragon)
Dragon scale.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%. Cost scales with CpS, but 10 times cheaper with a fully-trained dragon. "Your dragon sheds these regularly, so this one probably won't be missed. Note: icon not to scale."
Dragon scale.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text

Dragon claw.Name: Dragon claw
Dragon claw.base price: Money 1,800 x CpS (x0.1 if max level dragon)
Dragon claw.description: Clicks are +3% more powerful. Cost scales with CpS, but 10 times cheaper with a fully-trained dragon. "Will grow back in a few days' time. A six-inch retractable claw, like a razor, from the middle toe. So you know, try to show a little respect."
Dragon claw.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text

Dragon fang.Name: Dragon fang
Dragon fang.base price: Money 1,800 x CpS (x0.1 if max level dragon)
Dragon fang.description: +3% golden cookie gains. Dragon harvest and Dragonflight are 10% stronger. Cost scales with CpS, but 10 times cheaper with a fully-trained dragon. "Just a fallen baby tooth your dragon wanted you to have, as a gift. It might be smaller than an adult tooth, but it's still frighteningly sharp - and displays some awe-inspiring cavities, which you might expect from a creature made out of sweets."
Dragon fang.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text

Dragon teddy bear.Name: Dragon teddy bear
Dragon teddy bear.base price: Money 1,800 x CpS (x0.1 if max level dragon)
Dragon teddy bear.description: +3% random drops. Cost scales with CpS, but 10 times cheaper with a fully-trained dragon. "Your dragon used to sleep with this. Now it's time for you to have it. Crafted in the likelihood of a fearsome beast. Stuffed with magical herbs picked long ago by a wandering wizard. Woven from elven yarn and a polyester blend."
Dragon teddy bear.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text

Dragon cookie.Name: Dragon cookie
Dragon cookie.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%. "Imbued with the vigor and vitality of a full-grown cookie dragon, this mystical cookie will embolden your empire for the generations to come."
Dragon cookie.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text

Dragon's Fortune.Name: Dragon's Fortune
Dragon's Fortune.description: +123% CpS per golden cookie on-screen, multiplicative.[note 5]
Dragon's Fortune.auraEffect: Golden CpS Bonus: 2.23x With Reality Bending: 2.353x
Dragon's Fortune.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text

Dragon's Curve.Name: Dragon's Curve
Dragon's Curve.description: +5% sugar lump growth and sugar lumps are twice as likely to be unusual.
Dragon's Curve.auraEffect: Sugar Lump Effects: Aging Multiplier: 1.05x With Reality Bending: 1.055x Type Selection: 1 reroll With Reality Bending: 1 reroll, 10% chance of 2nd reroll
Dragon's Curve.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text

Reality Bending.Name: Reality Bending
Reality Bending.description: One tenth of every other dragon aura, combined.
Reality Bending.auraEffect: Base effects. See other auras for combined effects when equipped alongside Reality Bending. Milk Effect: 1.005x Clicking Effect: 1.005x Grandma Multiplier: 1 + ( 0.001 x ( N - G ) ) {\displaystyle 1+(0.001x(N-G))} Dragon Harvest pooling: 1.925% (or 0.5%) chance Sellback Rate: 27.5% Upgrade Discount: 0.998x Building Discount: 0.998x Prestige Bonus: 1.005x Golden Spawn: 1.005x Dragonflight pooling: 1.925% (or 0.5%) chance Golden Gain: 1.01x Wrath Gain: 1.01x Golden Time: 1.005x Random Drops: 1.025x Cookie Production: 1.1x Golden CpS Bonus: 1.123x Sugar Lump Effects: 1.005x Aging Multiplier, 10% chance of 1 reroll Wish Chance: 1% Minigame Powers Garden: 0.5% faster. Stock Market: Slightly chaotic. Pantheon: No effect. Grimoire: 1% difference. Wrinkler Effects: 1.02x wrinkler wither rate, 1.02x wrinkler drop rate
Reality Bending.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text

Dragon Orbs.Name: Dragon Orbs
Dragon Orbs.description: With no buffs and no golden cookies on screen, selling your most powerful building has 10% chance to summon one.
Dragon Orbs.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text

Supreme Intellect.Name: Supreme Intellect
Supreme Intellect.description: Confers various powers to your minigames while active.
Supreme Intellect.auraEffect: See the bottom of each minigame for more details.[note 6] Garden Garden plants age and mutate 5% faster. With Reality Bending: 5.5% faster. Stock Market The stock market is more chaotic. With Reality Bending: More chaotic. Pantheon The jade slot behaves as a ruby slot and the ruby slot behaves as a diamond slot. With Reality Bending: Base effect. Grimoire Grimoire spells are 10% cheaper but fail 10% more. With Reality Bending: 11% difference.
Supreme Intellect.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text

Dragon Guts.Name: Dragon Guts
Dragon Guts.auraEffect: Wrinklers digest 20% more cookies. Wrinklers explode into 20% more cookies. Wrinkler Effects: Number of wrinklers: +2 Unaffected by Reality Bending Wrinkler wither rate: 1.2x With Reality Bending: 1.22x Wrinkler drop rate: 1.2x With Reality Bending: 1.22x
Dragon Guts.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Krumblor pasted text
